steps.t: Blómgard can be found in Laerlad in the Vales of Anduin. You must defend Laerlad from the approaching invaders!
Odahild can be found in Blómgard. You should talk to Odahild.
The wounded Ungoladan warrior can be found in Blómgard. You should talk to the Ungoladan and learn what you can.
Radagast can be found in Blómgard. You should talk to Radagast.
